Introduction
    Geordie OGs is a TV series starring Holly Hagan, Marnie Simpson, and Aaron Chalmers. It's been eight years since Geordie Shore exploded on to our screens introducing us to Gaz, Holly, Marnie and Aaron. Now we step into their lives...
